retirementJustification: V1 loader/preload harness self-test; V2 uses standard tooling (vitest), no custom loader
V1-specific hardcoded npm-script test-list guard; not a behaviour; V2 discovers tests by convention

Package removed before V2 cut (delete-after-proof; zero-consumer superseded scaffold per ADR-0006/ADR-ACT-0289); the scaffold's smoke test is retired with it. No behaviour is lost — the capability is delivered by the replacement noted in v1-to-v2-path-map.json.
